sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51721" key="ka/qayis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κάθαψις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n51721.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">good reaction</tr_>, produced by friction after the bath, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄχρι πολλῆς κ</foreign>. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Agathin.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:10:7:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.7.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
